name: EQUUS TOTAL RETURN, INC.
summary: Equus Total Return, Inc. is a Delaware-based closed-end management investment company and Business Development Company (BDC) that seeks to maximize total return through capital appreciation and current income. It invests in debt and equity securities of small and middle market companies with enterprise values between $5 million and $75 million, targeting leveraged buyouts, recapitalizations, and growth investments. It also pursues oil and gas working interests and is exploring transformation into an operating company.

products.name: Debt Securities Investments
products.description: Investments in bonds, subordinated debt, convertible debt, and debt with warrants to generate interest income and capital appreciation.

products.name: Equity Investments
products.description: Investments in equity and equity-oriented securities of privately-owned or smaller public companies negotiated directly.

products.name: Oil and Gas Working Interests
products.description: Purchase or development of working interests, mineral interests, and revenue leasehold interests in oil and gas properties.

partnerships.description: Purchased a $1.5M senior convertible note and received warrants for 1,875,000 shares in GEVI, a fire suppression products developer.
Sold Equus Energy to NAEOC for $1.25M cash and 27,500 preferred shares redeemable at $100/share aggregate $2.75M.
